version_pin_rationale: libevdev 1.12.1+dfsg-1 is the jammy release build. CASCADE-E SECOND BLOCKER for sway: DT_NEEDED libevdev.so.2 not provided by R9 base or any prior catalog. libinput catalog notes claim libevdev2 is a 'host runtime dep' but the R9 from-source base has no host libevdev. libevdev2 is a thin wrapper over /dev/input/event* providing key/abs/rel-axis dispatch; sway uses it to translate raw input events into its own input-device abstraction. waybar's keyboard-state module also links it. No transitive deps beyond libc.
